title: Minescape.me Modpack
description: A Modpack with QOL features for Minescape.me Server
body:
Modpack Features:

Server map with Icons of notable locations

Custom themed Inventory GUI for InventoryHUD+ Mod

Scoreboard tweaks to remove red numbers from right side as well as add a coloured background can be changed in mod config in game if you dont like it.

Other Notes:

Uses Java 21
